revision.comment: 新しいページ：天神山古墳（山梨県甲府市にある古墳）。
revision.text:
{{日本の古墳 |名称 = 天神山古墳 |画像 = |別名 = |所属 = |所在地 = [[山梨県]][[甲府市]]下向山町 |緯度度 = 35|緯度分 = 34|緯度秒 = 58.53 |経度度 =138|経度分 = 34|経度秒 = 48.80 |ISO = JP-19 |形状 = [[前方後円墳]] |規模 = 墳丘長132m
高さ12m（後円部） |埋葬施設 = 不明 |出土品 = [[土師器]] |陪塚 = |築造時期 = [[古墳時代]]前期 |被葬者 = |陵墓 = |史跡 = 甲府市指定史跡「天神山古墳」 |有形文化財 = |特記事項 = 山梨県第2位の規模 |地図 = Japan Yamanashi |アイコン = 前方後円墳-北 |ラベル = 天神山古墳 |ラベル位置 = top }} '''天神山古墳'''（てんじんやまこふん）は、[[山梨県]][[甲府市]]下向山町にある[[古墳]]。形状は[[前方後円墳]]。甲府市指定史跡に指定されている。 山梨県では第2位の規模の古墳で山梨県における主な古墳は次の通り。 # [[甲斐銚子塚古墳]]（甲府市下曽根町） - 墳丘長169メートル。 # '''天神山古墳'''（甲府市下向山町） - 墳丘長132メートル。 # [[大丸山古墳]]（甲府市下曽根町） - 墳丘長120メートルか。、[[古墳時代]]前期頃の築造と推定される。 == 概要 == 山梨県中部、米倉山東方の丘陵上に築造された大型前方後円墳である。一帯では本古墳のほか[[甲斐銚子塚古墳]]・[[大丸山古墳]]・[[小平沢古墳]]といった有力古墳の築造が知られる。近年に発掘調査が実施されている。 墳形は前方後円形で、墳丘主軸を南北方向として前方部を北方に向ける{{Sfn|天神山古墳（古墳）|1989}}。墳丘長は132メートルを測り、山梨県では[[甲斐銚子塚古墳]]（甲府市下曽根町、169メートル）に次ぐ第2位の規模になる{{Sfn|天神山古墳（古墳）|1989}}。墳丘表面では[[葺石]]が認められるが、[[埴輪]]は認められておらず、初期[[須恵器]]を模倣した[[土師器]]𤭯が出土されている{{Sfn|天神山古墳（古墳）|1989}}。墳丘周囲には周溝の存在が推定される{{Sfn|天神山古墳（古墳）|1989}}。主体部の埋葬施設は明らかでない{{Sfn|天神山古墳（古墳）|1989}}。以上より、築造時期は[[古墳時代]]前期頃と推定される。 古墳域は[[2009年]]（[[平成]]21年）に甲府市指定史跡に指定されている。 === 来歴 === * [[1951年|1951]]-[[1953年]]（[[昭和]]26-28年）頃、耕作中に土師器𤭯の出土{{Sfn|天神山古墳（古墳）|1989}}。 * [[2009年]]（[[平成]]21年）3月25日、甲府市指定史跡に指定。 == 構造 == 古墳の規模は次の通り{{Sfn|天神山古墳（古墳）|1989}}。 * 墳丘長：132メートル * 後円部 ** 直径：67メートル ** 高さ：12メートル * 前方部 ** 幅：29メートル ** 高さ：7メートル == 文化財 == === 甲府市指定文化財 === * 史跡 ** 天神山古墳 - 2009年（平成21年）3月25日指定平成21年4月6日甲府市公報より{{PDFlink|[http://www.city.kofu.yamanashi.jp/somu-somu/shise/documents/1315_06.pdf 甲府市教育委員会告示第2号]}}（リンクは甲府市ホームページ）。。 == 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} '''注釈''' {{reflist|group="注"}} '''出典''' {{reflist}} == 参考文献 == {{small|（記事執筆に使用した文献）}} * {{Cite book|和書|editor=|author=宮沢公雄|year=1989|chapter=天神山古墳|title=[[日本古墳大辞典]]|publisher=[[東京堂出版]]|isbn=4490102607|ref={{Harvid|天神山古墳（古墳）|1989}}}} == 関連文献 == {{small|（記事執筆に使用していない関連文献）}} * {{Cite book|和書|editor=|author=|year=2015|chapter=|title=天神山古墳 -第一次・第二次発掘調査報告書-（甲府市文化財調査報告 78）|publisher=甲府市教育委員会|isbn=|ref=}} == 関連項目 == * [[甲斐銚子塚古墳]] {{デフォルトソート:てんしんやまこふん こうふし}} [[Category:山梨県の古墳]] [[Category:甲府市の歴史]] [[Category:前方後円墳]]

revision.comment: /* 構造 */ 構造→墳丘。

revision.comment: 「主体部」除去。
revision.text:
{{日本の古墳 |名称 = 天神山古墳 |画像 = {{画像募集中|cat=甲府市}} |別名 = |所属 = |所在地 = [[山梨県]][[甲府市]]下向山町 |緯度度 = 35|緯度分 = 34|緯度秒 = 58.53 |経度度 =138|経度分 = 34|経度秒 = 48.80 |ISO = JP-19 |形状 = [[前方後円墳]] |規模 = 墳丘長132m
高さ12m（後円部） |埋葬施設 = 不明 |出土品 = [[土師器]] |陪塚 = |築造時期 = [[古墳時代]]前期 |被葬者 = |陵墓 = |史跡 = 甲府市指定史跡「天神山古墳」 |有形文化財 = |特記事項 = 山梨県第2位の規模 |地図 = Japan Yamanashi |アイコン = 前方後円墳-北 |ラベル = 天神山古墳 |ラベル位置 = top }} '''天神山古墳'''（てんじんやまこふん）は、[[山梨県]][[甲府市]]下向山町にある[[古墳]]。形状は[[前方後円墳]]。甲府市指定史跡に指定されている。 山梨県では第2位の規模の古墳で山梨県における主な古墳は次の通り。 # [[甲斐銚子塚古墳]]（甲府市下曽根町） - 墳丘長169メートル。 # '''天神山古墳'''（甲府市下向山町） - 墳丘長132メートル。 # [[大丸山古墳]]（甲府市下曽根町） - 墳丘長120メートルか。、[[古墳時代]]前期頃の築造と推定される。 == 概要 == 山梨県中部、米倉山東方の丘陵上に築造された大型前方後円墳である。一帯では本古墳のほか[[甲斐銚子塚古墳]]・[[大丸山古墳]]・[[小平沢古墳]]といった有力古墳の築造が知られる。近年に発掘調査が実施されている。 墳形は前方後円形で、墳丘主軸を南北方向として前方部を北方に向ける{{Sfn|天神山古墳（古墳）|1989}}。墳丘長は132メートルを測り、山梨県では[[甲斐銚子塚古墳]]（甲府市下曽根町、169メートル）に次ぐ第2位の規模になる{{Sfn|天神山古墳（古墳）|1989}}。墳丘表面では[[葺石]]が認められるが、[[埴輪]]は認められておらず、初期[[須恵器]]を模倣した[[土師器]]𤭯が出土されている{{Sfn|天神山古墳（古墳）|1989}}。墳丘周囲には周溝の存在が推定される{{Sfn|天神山古墳（古墳）|1989}}。埋葬施設は明らかでない{{Sfn|天神山古墳（古墳）|1989}}。以上より、築造時期は[[古墳時代]]前期頃と推定される。 古墳域は[[2009年]]（[[平成]]21年）に甲府市指定史跡に指定されている。 === 来歴 === * [[1951年|1951]]-[[1953年]]（[[昭和]]26-28年）頃、耕作中に土師器𤭯の出土{{Sfn|天神山古墳（古墳）|1989}}。 * [[2009年]]（[[平成]]21年）3月25日、甲府市指定史跡に指定。 == 墳丘 == 墳丘の規模は次の通り{{Sfn|天神山古墳（古墳）|1989}}。 * 墳丘長：132メートル * 後円部 ** 直径：67メートル ** 高さ：12メートル * 前方部 ** 幅：29メートル ** 高さ：7メートル == 文化財 == === 甲府市指定文化財 === * 史跡 ** 天神山古墳 - 2009年（平成21年）3月25日指定平成21年4月6日甲府市公報より{{PDFlink|[http://www.city.kofu.yamanashi.jp/somu-somu/shise/documents/1315_06.pdf 甲府市教育委員会告示第2号]}}（リンクは甲府市ホームページ）。。 == 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} '''注釈''' {{reflist|group="注"}} '''出典''' {{reflist}} == 参考文献 == {{small|（記事執筆に使用した文献）}} * {{Cite book|和書|editor=|author=宮沢公雄|year=1989|chapter=天神山古墳|title=[[日本古墳大辞典]]|publisher=[[東京堂出版]]|isbn=4490102607|ref={{Harvid|天神山古墳（古墳）|1989}}}} == 関連文献 == {{small|（記事執筆に使用していない関連文献）}} * {{Cite book|和書|editor=|author=|year=2015|chapter=|title=天神山古墳 -第一次・第二次発掘調査報告書-（甲府市文化財調査報告 78）|publisher=甲府市教育委員会|isbn=|ref=}} == 関連項目 == * [[甲斐銚子塚古墳]] {{デフォルトソート:てんしんやまこふん こうふし}} [[Category:山梨県の古墳]] [[Category:甲府市の歴史]] [[Category:前方後円墳]] [[Category:山梨県内の市町村指定史跡]]

revision.text:
{{日本の古墳 |名称 = 天神山古墳 |画像 = [[File:Tenjin-yama Kofun (Kofu), funkyu.jpg|280px]]
墳丘 |別名 = 天神塚古墳 |所属 = |所在地 = [[山梨県]][[甲府市]]下向山町 |緯度度 = 35|緯度分 = 34|緯度秒 = 58.53 |経度度 =138|経度分 = 34|経度秒 = 48.80 |ISO = JP-19 |形状 = [[前方後円墳]] |規模 = 墳丘長132m
高さ12m（後円部） |埋葬施設 = 不明 |出土品 = [[土師器]] |陪塚 = |築造時期 = [[古墳時代]]前期 |被葬者 = |陵墓 = |史跡 = 甲府市指定史跡「天神山古墳」 |有形文化財 = |特記事項 = 山梨県第2位の規模 |地図 = Japan Yamanashi |アイコン = 前方後円墳-北 |ラベル = 天神山古墳 |ラベル位置 = top }} '''天神山古墳'''（てんじんやまこふん、天神塚古墳）は、[[山梨県]][[甲府市]]下向山町にある[[古墳]]。形状は[[前方後円墳]]。甲府市指定史跡に指定されている。 山梨県では第2位の規模の古墳で山梨県における主な古墳は次の通り。 # [[甲斐銚子塚古墳]]（甲府市下曽根町） - 墳丘長169メートル。 # '''天神山古墳'''（甲府市下向山町） - 墳丘長132メートル。 # [[大丸山古墳]]（甲府市下曽根町） - 墳丘長120メートルか。、[[古墳時代]]前期頃の築造と推定される。 == 概要 == 山梨県中部、米倉山東方の丘陵上に築造された大型前方後円墳である。一帯では本古墳のほか[[甲斐銚子塚古墳]]・[[大丸山古墳]]・[[小平沢古墳]]といった有力古墳の築造が知られる。近年に発掘調査が実施されている。 墳形は前方後円形で、墳丘主軸を南北方向として前方部を北方向に向ける{{Sfn|天神山古墳（古墳）|1989}}。墳丘長は132メートルを測り、山梨県では[[甲斐銚子塚古墳]]（甲府市下曽根町、169メートル）に次ぐ第2位の規模になる{{Sfn|天神山古墳（古墳）|1989}}。墳丘外表では[[葺石]]が認められるが、[[埴輪]]は認められておらず、初期[[須恵器]]を模倣した[[土師器]]𤭯が出土されている{{Sfn|天神山古墳（古墳）|1989}}。墳丘周囲には周溝の存在が推定される{{Sfn|天神山古墳（古墳）|1989}}。埋葬施設は明らかでない{{Sfn|天神山古墳（古墳）|1989}}。築造時期は[[古墳時代]]前期頃と推定される。 古墳域は[[2009年]]（[[平成]]21年）に甲府市指定史跡に指定されている。 === 来歴 === * [[1951年|1951]]-[[1953年]]（[[昭和]]26-28年）頃、耕作中に土師器𤭯の出土{{Sfn|天神山古墳（古墳）|1989}}。 * [[2009年]]（[[平成]]21年）3月25日、甲府市指定史跡に指定。 * 発掘調査（甲府市教育委員会、[[2015年]]に報告書刊行）。 == 墳丘 == 墳丘の規模は次の通り{{Sfn|天神山古墳（古墳）|1989}}。 * 墳丘長：132メートル * 後円部 ** 直径：67メートル ** 高さ：12メートル * 前方部 ** 幅：29メートル ** 高さ：7メートル == 文化財 == === 甲府市指定文化財 === * 史跡 ** 天神山古墳 - 2009年（平成21年）3月25日指定平成21年4月6日甲府市公報より{{PDFlink|[http://www.city.kofu.yamanashi.jp/somu-somu/shise/documents/1315_06.pdf 甲府市教育委員会告示第2号]}}（リンクは甲府市ホームページ）。。 == 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} '''注釈''' {{reflist|group="注"}} '''出典''' {{reflist}} == 参考文献 == {{small|（記事執筆に使用した文献）}} * {{Cite book|和書|editor=|author=宮沢公雄|year=1989|chapter=天神山古墳|title=[[日本古墳大辞典]]|publisher=[[東京堂出版]]|isbn=4490102607|ref={{Harvid|天神山古墳（古墳）|1989}}}} == 関連文献 == {{small|（記事執筆に使用していない関連文献）}} * {{Cite book|和書|editor=|author=|year=2015|chapter=|title=天神山古墳 -第一次・第二次発掘調査報告書-（甲府市文化財調査報告 78）|publisher=甲府市教育委員会|isbn=|ref=}} == 関連項目 == * [[甲斐銚子塚古墳]] {{デフォルトソート:てんしんやまこふん こうふし}} [[Category:山梨県の古墳]] [[Category:甲府市の歴史]] [[Category:前方後円墳]] [[Category:山梨県内の市町村指定史跡]]

revision.comment: removing translated page thing before I start working on fixing the histories
revision.text:
{{afc comment|1=trimming these off. the parameter works as "burial" so no need to use "Burial Facility"[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:35, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=added parameters Interred_individual and Mausoleum is planned to be added but I messed up in template editing[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:40, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=now we have a 'burial' and 'burial goods' parameter. So a lot of these pages might not be marked on our wiki as having unknown parameters. But specifically keeping this comment here in case of import, these parameters should be added to [[Template:infobox ancient site]] rather than deleted from this draft or article[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:02, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=I hope this is not too annoying but this article is gonna be placed under and there is a decent chance these unknown parameters are ones I want added to the main template like burial chamber structure and burial goods. Please do not use any bots that just remove the unknown parameters without looking at them. This was added through [[Special:MassEditRegex]] to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox Kofun in Japan |name = Tenjinyama Kofun |image = [[File:Tenjin-yama Kofun (Kofu), funkyu.jpg|280px]]
Mound |alternate_name = Tenjinzuka Kofun |part_of = |location = {{ill|Kofu|ja|甲府市|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kofu|qq=}}, {{ill|Yamanashi Prefecture|ja|山梨県|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamanashi Prefecture|qq=}}, Shimomukoyama Town |coordinates = 35|coordinates = 34|coordinates = 58.53 |coordinates = 138|coordinates = 34|coordinates = 48.80 |omitted = JP-19 |type = {{ill|Zenpō-kōen-fun|ja|前方後円墳|1=Zenpokoenfun|1=Zenpokoenfun|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zenpō-kōen-fun|13=User:Immanuelle/Zenpokoenfun|qq=}} |area = Mound length: 132 m
Height: 12 m (rear circular portion) |burial = Unknown |burial goods = {{ill|Haji pottery|ja|土師器|1=Haji pottery|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Haji pottery|13=User:Immanuelle/Haji pottery|qq=}} |Associated Tumuli = |built = Early {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kofun period|qq=}} |Interred_individual = |Mausoleum = |alternate_name = Kofu City Designated Historic Site: Tenjinyama Kofun |Tangible Cultural Property = |notes = Second largest kofun in Yamanashi Prefecture |map = Japan Yamanashi |type = Zenpō-kōen-fun-north |map_dot_label = Tenjinyama Kofun |map_dot_label = top }} The **Tenjinyama Kofun** (天神山古墳, also known as Tenjinzuka Kofun) is a {{ill|kofun|ja|古墳|1=Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/kofun|13=User:Immanuelle/Kofun|qq=}} located in {{ill|Kofu|ja|甲府市|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kofu|qq=}}, {{ill|Yamanashi Prefecture|ja|山梨県|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamanashi Prefecture|qq=}}, Japan. The mound is in the {{ill|Zenpō-kōen-fun|ja|前方後円墳|1=Zenpokoenfun|1=Zenpokoenfun|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zenpō-kōen-fun|13=User:Immanuelle/Zenpokoenfun|qq=}} type and has been designation1 a Kofu City Historic Site. This kofun is the second largest in Yamanashi Prefecture, following the {{ill|Kai Chōshizuka Kofun|ja|甲斐銚子塚古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kai Chōshizuka Kofun|qq=}}.Major kofun in Yamanashi Prefecture include: 1. {{ill|Kai Chōshizuka Kofun|ja|甲斐銚子塚古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kai Chōshizuka Kofun|qq=}} (Kofu City, Shimosone Town) - Mound length: 169 m. 2. **Tenjinyama Kofun** (Kofu City, Shimomukoyama Town) - Mound length: 132 m. 3. {{ill|Daimaruyama Kofun|ja|大丸山古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daimaruyama Kofun|qq=}} (Kofu City, Shimosone Town) - Mound length: approx. 120 m? It is believed to have been constructed in the early {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kofun period|qq=}}. == Overview == The Tenjinyama Kofun is a large {{ill|Zenpō-kōen-fun|ja|前方後円墳|1=Zenpokoenfun|1=Zenpokoenfun|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zenpō-kōen-fun|13=User:Immanuelle/Zenpokoenfun|qq=}} built on a hill to the east of the Yonekura Mountains in central Yamanashi Prefecture. In addition to this kofun, other prominent kofun in the area include the {{ill|Kai Chōshizuka Kofun|ja|甲斐銚子塚古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kai Chōshizuka Kofun|qq=}}, {{ill|Ōmaruyama Kofun|ja|大丸山古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōmaruyama Kofun|qq=}}, and {{ill|Kodairazawa Kofun|ja|小平沢古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kodairazawa Kofun|qq=}}. Recent excavations have been conducted in this region. The mound is oriented north-south, with the front part facing north.{{Cite book|author=Miyazawa Kimio|year=1989|chapter=Tenjinyama Kofun|title=[[Japanese Kofun Encyclopedia]]|publisher=[[Tokyo-dō Shuppan]]|isbn=4490102607|ref={{Harvid|Tenjinyama Kofun (Kofun)|1989}}}} It measures 132 meters in length, making it the second largest kofun in Yamanashi Prefecture after the {{ill|Kai Chōshizuka Kofun|ja|甲斐銚子塚古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kai Chōshizuka Kofun|qq=}} (169 meters).{{Harvid|Tenjinyama Kofun (Kofun)|1989}} The surface of the mound shows evidence of {{ill|fukiishi|ja|葺石|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/fukiishi|qq=}}, but no {{ill|haniwa|ja|埴輪|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/haniwa|qq=}} have been found. However, Haji pottery imitating early {{ill|Sue pottery|ja|須恵器|1=Sue pottery|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sue pottery|13=User:Immanuelle/Sue pottery|qq=}} was discovered.{{Harvid|Tenjinyama Kofun (Kofun)|1989}} Surrounding the mound, a moat is believed to have existed.{{Harvid|Tenjinyama Kofun (Kofun)|1989}} The burial facility has not been identified.{{Harvid|Tenjinyama Kofun (Kofun)|1989}} The kofun is estimated to have been built in the early {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kofun period|qq=}}. The kofun site was designation1 a Kofu City Historic Site in 2009 (Heisei 21).{{Cite web|url=http://www.city.kofu.yamanashi.jp/somu-somu/shise/documents/1315_06.pdf|title=Kofu City Board of Education Notification No. 2|publisher=Kofu City Official Gazette|date=April 6, 2009}} == Excavation History == * {{ill|1951|ja|昭和26年|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1951|qq=}}-{{ill|1953|ja|昭和28th year|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1953|qq=}}: Discovery of Haji pottery during farming activities.{{Harvid|Tenjinyama Kofun (Kofun)|1989}} * {{ill|2009|ja|平成21st year|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2009|qq=}}: Designated a Kofu City Historic Site on March 25. * Excavations were conducted, with the Kofu City Board of Education publishing a report in {{ill|2015|ja|平成27th year|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2015|qq=}}. == Mound area == The area of the mound are as follows:{{Harvid|Tenjinyama Kofun (Kofun)|1989}} * Total length: 132 meters * Rear circular portion: ** Diameter: 67 meters ** Height: 12 meters * Front rectangular portion: ** Width: 29 meters ** Height: 7 meters == Historic Site == === Kofu City Designated Historic Site === * Historic Site ** **Tenjinyama Kofun** - Designated on March 25, 2009. == References == {{Reflist}} == Further Reading == {{small|(Sources used in the article)}} * {{Cite book|author=Miyazawa Kimio|year=1989|chapter=Tenjinyama Kofun|title=[[Japanese Kofun Encyclopedia]]|publisher=[[Tokyo-dō Shuppan]]|isbn=4490102607}} == Related Literature == {{small|(Literature not used in the article)}} * {{Cite book|year=2015|title=Tenjinyama Kofun: First and Second Excavation Reports (Kofu City Cultural Property Research Report No. 78)|publisher=Kofu City Board of Education}} == See Also == * {{ill|Kai Chōshizuka Kofun|ja|甲斐銚子塚古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kai Chōshizuka Kofun|qq=}} {{Kofun navbar}} {{citation needed|ja|天神山古墳|version=89534583|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Kofun template and pages that transclude it]] [[Category:Kofun template and pages that transclude it 2]] [[Category:marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:Kofun in Yamanashi Prefecture]] [[Category:History of Kofu]] [[Category:Zenpō-kōen-fun]] [[Category:Municipal Historic Sites in Yamanashi Prefecture]] [[Category:天神山古墳 (甲府市)]] [[Category:Completion tier 6]] [[Category:Tenjinyama Kofun (Kōfu)]] [[Category:Fixed Kofun templates]] [[Category:Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[sn:Tenjinyama Kofun (Kōfu)]]}} [[sn:Tenjinyama Kofun (Kōfu)]] [[ja:天神山古墳]] [[ja:%E5%A4%A9%E7%A5%9E%E5%B1%B1%E5%8F%A4%E5%A2%B3 (%E7%94%B2%E5%BA%9C%E5%B8%82)]] [[ja:&action=edit]] [[ja:天神山古墳 (甲府市)]] [[sn:enjinyama Kofun (Kōfu)]] [[Category:pages needing proper jawiki and history import]]

{{afc comment|1=trimming these off. the parameter works as "burial" so no need to use "Burial Facility"[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:35, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=added parameters Interred_individual and Mausoleum is planned to be added but I messed up in template editing[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:40, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=now we have a 'burial' and 'burial goods' parameter. So a lot of these pages might not be marked on our wiki as having unknown parameters. But specifically keeping this comment here in case of import, these parameters should be added to [[Template:infobox ancient site]] rather than deleted from this draft or article[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:02, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=I hope this is not too annoying but this article is gonna be placed under and there is a decent chance these unknown parameters are ones I want added to the main template like burial chamber structure and burial goods. Please do not use any bots that just remove the unknown parameters without looking at them. This was added through [[Special:MassEditRegex]] to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox Kofun in Japan |name = Tenjinyama Kofun |image = [[File:Tenjin-yama Kofun (Kofu), funkyu.jpg|280px]]
Mound |alternate_name = Tenjinzuka Kofun |part_of = |location = {{ill|Kofu|ja|甲府市|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kofu|qq=}}, {{ill|Yamanashi Prefecture|ja|山梨県|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamanashi Prefecture|qq=}}, Shimomukoyama Town |coordinates = 35|coordinates = 34|coordinates = 58.53 |coordinates = 138|coordinates = 34|coordinates = 48.80 |omitted = JP-19 |type = {{ill|Zenpō-kōen-fun|ja|前方後円墳|1=Zenpokoenfun|1=Zenpokoenfun|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zenpō-kōen-fun|13=User:Immanuelle/Zenpokoenfun|qq=}} |area = Mound length: 132 m
Height: 12 m (rear circular portion) |burial = Unknown |burial goods = {{ill|Haji pottery|ja|土師器|1=Haji pottery|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Haji pottery|13=User:Immanuelle/Haji pottery|qq=}} |Associated Tumuli = |built = Early {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kofun period|qq=}} |Interred_individual = |Mausoleum = |alternate_name = Kofu City Designated Historic Site: Tenjinyama Kofun |Tangible Cultural Property = |notes = Second largest kofun in Yamanashi Prefecture |map = Japan Yamanashi |type = Zenpō-kōen-fun-north |map_dot_label = Tenjinyama Kofun |map_dot_label = top }} The **Tenjinyama Kofun** (天神山古墳, also known as Tenjinzuka Kofun) is a {{ill|kofun|ja|古墳|1=Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/kofun|13=User:Immanuelle/Kofun|qq=}} located in {{ill|Kofu|ja|甲府市|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kofu|qq=}}, {{ill|Yamanashi Prefecture|ja|山梨県|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamanashi Prefecture|qq=}}, Japan. The mound is in the {{ill|Zenpō-kōen-fun|ja|前方後円墳|1=Zenpokoenfun|1=Zenpokoenfun|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zenpō-kōen-fun|13=User:Immanuelle/Zenpokoenfun|qq=}} type and has been designation1 a Kofu City Historic Site. This kofun is the second largest in Yamanashi Prefecture, following the {{ill|Kai Chōshizuka Kofun|ja|甲斐銚子塚古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kai Chōshizuka Kofun|qq=}}.Major kofun in Yamanashi Prefecture include: 1. {{ill|Kai Chōshizuka Kofun|ja|甲斐銚子塚古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kai Chōshizuka Kofun|qq=}} (Kofu City, Shimosone Town) - Mound length: 169 m. 2. **Tenjinyama Kofun** (Kofu City, Shimomukoyama Town) - Mound length: 132 m. 3. {{ill|Daimaruyama Kofun|ja|大丸山古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daimaruyama Kofun|qq=}} (Kofu City, Shimosone Town) - Mound length: approx. 120 m? It is believed to have been constructed in the early {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kofun period|qq=}}. == Overview == The Tenjinyama Kofun is a large {{ill|Zenpō-kōen-fun|ja|前方後円墳|1=Zenpokoenfun|1=Zenpokoenfun|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zenpō-kōen-fun|13=User:Immanuelle/Zenpokoenfun|qq=}} built on a hill to the east of the Yonekura Mountains in central Yamanashi Prefecture. In addition to this kofun, other prominent kofun in the area include the {{ill|Kai Chōshizuka Kofun|ja|甲斐銚子塚古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kai Chōshizuka Kofun|qq=}}, {{ill|Ōmaruyama Kofun|ja|大丸山古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōmaruyama Kofun|qq=}}, and {{ill|Kodairazawa Kofun|ja|小平沢古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kodairazawa Kofun|qq=}}. Recent excavations have been conducted in this region. The mound is oriented north-south, with the front part facing north.{{Cite book|author=Miyazawa Kimio|year=1989|chapter=Tenjinyama Kofun|title=[[Japanese Kofun Encyclopedia]]|publisher=[[Tokyo-dō Shuppan]]|isbn=4490102607|ref={{Harvid|Tenjinyama Kofun (Kofun)|1989}}}} It measures 132 meters in length, making it the second largest kofun in Yamanashi Prefecture after the {{ill|Kai Chōshizuka Kofun|ja|甲斐銚子塚古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kai Chōshizuka Kofun|qq=}} (169 meters).{{Harvid|Tenjinyama Kofun (Kofun)|1989}} The surface of the mound shows evidence of {{ill|fukiishi|ja|葺石|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/fukiishi|qq=}}, but no {{ill|haniwa|ja|埴輪|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/haniwa|qq=}} have been found. However, Haji pottery imitating early {{ill|Sue pottery|ja|須恵器|1=Sue pottery|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sue pottery|13=User:Immanuelle/Sue pottery|qq=}} was discovered.{{Harvid|Tenjinyama Kofun (Kofun)|1989}} Surrounding the mound, a moat is believed to have existed.{{Harvid|Tenjinyama Kofun (Kofun)|1989}} The burial facility has not been identified.{{Harvid|Tenjinyama Kofun (Kofun)|1989}} The kofun is estimated to have been built in the early {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kofun period|qq=}}. The kofun site was designation1 a Kofu City Historic Site in 2009 (Heisei 21).{{Cite web|url=http://www.city.kofu.yamanashi.jp/somu-somu/shise/documents/1315_06.pdf|title=Kofu City Board of Education Notification No. 2|publisher=Kofu City Official Gazette|date=April 6, 2009}} == Excavation History == * {{ill|1951|ja|昭和26年|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1951|qq=}}-{{ill|1953|ja|昭和28th year|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1953|qq=}}: Discovery of Haji pottery during farming activities.{{Harvid|Tenjinyama Kofun (Kofun)|1989}} * {{ill|2009|ja|平成21st year|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2009|qq=}}: Designated a Kofu City Historic Site on March 25. * Excavations were conducted, with the Kofu City Board of Education publishing a report in {{ill|2015|ja|平成27th year|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2015|qq=}}. == Mound area == The area of the mound are as follows:{{Harvid|Tenjinyama Kofun (Kofun)|1989}} * Total length: 132 meters * Rear circular portion: ** Diameter: 67 meters ** Height: 12 meters * Front rectangular portion: ** Width: 29 meters ** Height: 7 meters == Historic Site == === Kofu City Designated Historic Site === * Historic Site ** **Tenjinyama Kofun** - Designated on March 25, 2009. == References == {{Reflist}} == Further Reading == {{small|(Sources used in the article)}} * {{Cite book|author=Miyazawa Kimio|year=1989|chapter=Tenjinyama Kofun|title=[[Japanese Kofun Encyclopedia]]|publisher=[[Tokyo-dō Shuppan]]|isbn=4490102607}} == Related Literature == {{small|(Literature not used in the article)}} * {{Cite book|year=2015|title=Tenjinyama Kofun: First and Second Excavation Reports (Kofu City Cultural Property Research Report No. 78)|publisher=Kofu City Board of Education}} == See Also == * {{ill|Kai Chōshizuka Kofun|ja|甲斐銚子塚古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kai Chōshizuka Kofun|qq=}} {{Kofun navbar}} {{citation needed|ja|天神山古墳|version=89534583|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Kofun template and pages that transclude it]] [[Category:Kofun template and pages that transclude it 2]] [[Category:marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:Kofun in Yamanashi Prefecture]] [[Category:History of Kofu]] [[Category:Zenpō-kōen-fun]] [[Category:Municipal Historic Sites in Yamanashi Prefecture]] [[Category:天神山古墳 (甲府市)]] [[Category:Completion tier 6]] [[Category:Tenjinyama Kofun (Kōfu)]] [[Category:Fixed Kofun templates]] [[Category:Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[sn:Tenjinyama Kofun (Kōfu)]]}} [[sn:Tenjinyama Kofun (Kōfu)]] [[ja:天神山古墳]] [[ja:%E5%A4%A9%E7%A5%9E%E5%B1%B1%E5%8F%A4%E5%A2%B3 (%E7%94%B2%E5%BA%9C%E5%B8%82)]] [[ja:&action=edit]] [[ja:天神山古墳 (甲府市)]] [[sn:enjinyama Kofun (Kōfu)]] [[Category:pages needing proper jawiki and history import]]

However, Haji pottery imitating early {{ill|Sue pottery|ja|須恵器|1=Sue pottery|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sue pottery|13=User:Immanuelle/Sue pottery|qq=}} was discovered.{{Harvid|Tenjinyama Kofun (Kofun)|1989}} Surrounding the mound, a moat is believed to have existed.{{Harvid|Tenjinyama Kofun (Kofun)|1989}} The burial facility has not been identified.{{Harvid|Tenjinyama Kofun (Kofun)|1989}} The kofun is estimated to have been built in the early {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kofun period|qq=}}. The kofun site was designation1 a Kofu City Historic Site in 2009 (Heisei 21).{{Cite web|url=http://www.city.kofu.yamanashi.jp/somu-somu/shise/documents/1315_06.pdf|title=Kofu City Board of Education Notification No. 2|publisher=Kofu City Official Gazette|date=April 6, 2009}} == Excavation History == * {{ill|1951|ja|昭和26年|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1951|qq=}}-{{ill|1953|ja|昭和28th year|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1953|qq=}}: Discovery of Haji pottery during farming activities.{{Harvid|Tenjinyama Kofun (Kofun)|1989}} * {{ill|2009|ja|平成21st year|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2009|qq=}}: Designated a Kofu City Historic Site on March 25. * Excavations were conducted, with the Kofu City Board of Education publishing a report in {{ill|2015|ja|平成27th year|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2015|qq=}}. == Mound area == The area of the mound are as follows:{{Harvid|Tenjinyama Kofun (Kofun)|1989}} * Total length: 132 meters * Rear circular portion: ** Diameter: 67 meters ** Height: 12 meters * Front rectangular portion: ** Width: 29 meters ** Height: 7 meters == Historic Site == === Kofu City Designated Historic Site === * Historic Site ** **Tenjinyama Kofun** - Designated on March 25, 2009. == References == {{Reflist}} == Further Reading == {{small|(Sources used in the article)}} * {{Cite book|author=Miyazawa Kimio|year=1989|chapter=Tenjinyama Kofun|title=[[Japanese Kofun Encyclopedia]]|publisher=[[Tokyo-dō Shuppan]]|isbn=4490102607}} == Related Literature == {{small|(Literature not used in the article)}} * {{Cite book|year=2015|title=Tenjinyama Kofun: First and Second Excavation Reports (Kofu City Cultural Property Research Report No. 78)|publisher=Kofu City Board of Education}} == See Also == * {{ill|Kai Chōshizuka Kofun|ja|甲斐銚子塚古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kai Chōshizuka Kofun|qq=}} {{Kofun navbar}} {{citation needed|ja|天神山古墳|version=89534583|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Kofun template and pages that transclude it]] [[Category:Kofun template and pages that transclude it 2]] [[Category:marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:Kofun in Yamanashi Prefecture]] [[Category:History of Kofu]] [[Category:Zenpō-kōen-fun]] [[Category:Municipal Historic Sites in Yamanashi Prefecture]] [[Category:天神山古墳 (甲府市)]] [[Category:Completion tier 6]] [[Category:Tenjinyama Kofun (Kōfu)]] [[Category:Fixed Kofun templates]] [[Category:Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[sn:Tenjinyama Kofun (Kōfu)]]}} [[sn:Tenjinyama Kofun (Kōfu)]] [[ja:天神山古墳]] [[ja:%E5%A4%A9%E7%A5%9E%E5%B1%B1%E5%8F%A4%E5%A2%B3 (%E7%94%B2%E5%BA%9C%E5%B8%82)]] [[ja:&action=edit]] [[ja:天神山古墳 (甲府市)]] [[sn:enjinyama Kofun (Kōfu)]] [[Category:pages needing proper jawiki and history import]]

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: Importing a single revision of my older page. Because the history was messed up. Everything else here was just mine but the jawiki stuff will be imported soon
revision.text:
{{afc comment|1=trimming these off. the parameter works as "burial" so no need to use "Burial Facility"[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:35, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=added parameters Interred_individual and Mausoleum is planned to be added but I messed up in template editing[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:40, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=now we have a 'burial' and 'burial goods' parameter. So a lot of these pages might not be marked on our wiki as having unknown parameters. But specifically keeping this comment here in case of import, these parameters should be added to [[Template:infobox ancient site]] rather than deleted from this draft or article[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:02, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=I hope this is not too annoying but this article is gonna be placed under and there is a decent chance these unknown parameters are ones I want added to the main template like burial chamber structure and burial goods. Please do not use any bots that just remove the unknown parameters without looking at them. This was added through [[Special:MassEditRegex]] to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox Kofun in Japan |name = Tenjinyama Kofun |image = [[File:Tenjin-yama Kofun (Kofu), funkyu.jpg|280px]]
Mound |alternate_name = Tenjinzuka Kofun |part_of = |location = {{ill|Kofu|ja|甲府市|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kofu|qq=}}, {{ill|Yamanashi Prefecture|ja|山梨県|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamanashi Prefecture|qq=}}, Shimomukoyama Town |coordinates = 35|coordinates = 34|coordinates = 58.53 |coordinates = 138|coordinates = 34|coordinates = 48.80 |omitted = JP-19 |type = {{ill|Zenpō-kōen-fun|ja|前方後円墳|1=Zenpokoenfun|1=Zenpokoenfun|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zenpō-kōen-fun|13=User:Immanuelle/Zenpokoenfun|qq=}} |area = Mound length: 132 m
Height: 12 m (rear circular portion) |burial = Unknown |burial goods = {{ill|Haji pottery|ja|土師器|1=Haji pottery|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Haji pottery|13=User:Immanuelle/Haji pottery|qq=}} |Associated Tumuli = |built = Early {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kofun period|qq=}} |Interred_individual = |Mausoleum = |alternate_name = Kofu City Designated Historic Site: Tenjinyama Kofun |Tangible Cultural Property = |notes = Second largest kofun in Yamanashi Prefecture |map = Japan Yamanashi |type = Zenpō-kōen-fun-north |map_dot_label = Tenjinyama Kofun |map_dot_label = top }} The **Tenjinyama Kofun** (天神山古墳, also known as Tenjinzuka Kofun) is a {{ill|kofun|ja|古墳|1=Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/kofun|13=User:Immanuelle/Kofun|qq=}} located in {{ill|Kofu|ja|甲府市|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kofu|qq=}}, {{ill|Yamanashi Prefecture|ja|山梨県|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamanashi Prefecture|qq=}}, Japan. The mound is in the {{ill|Zenpō-kōen-fun|ja|前方後円墳|1=Zenpokoenfun|1=Zenpokoenfun|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zenpō-kōen-fun|13=User:Immanuelle/Zenpokoenfun|qq=}} type and has been designation1 a Kofu City Historic Site. This kofun is the second largest in Yamanashi Prefecture, following the {{ill|Kai Chōshizuka Kofun|ja|甲斐銚子塚古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kai Chōshizuka Kofun|qq=}}.Major kofun in Yamanashi Prefecture include: 1. {{ill|Kai Chōshizuka Kofun|ja|甲斐銚子塚古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kai Chōshizuka Kofun|qq=}} (Kofu City, Shimosone Town) - Mound length: 169 m. 2. **Tenjinyama Kofun** (Kofu City, Shimomukoyama Town) - Mound length: 132 m. 3. {{ill|Daimaruyama Kofun|ja|大丸山古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daimaruyama Kofun|qq=}} (Kofu City, Shimosone Town) - Mound length: approx. 120 m? It is believed to have been constructed in the early {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kofun period|qq=}}. == Overview == The Tenjinyama Kofun is a large {{ill|Zenpō-kōen-fun|ja|前方後円墳|1=Zenpokoenfun|1=Zenpokoenfun|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zenpō-kōen-fun|13=User:Immanuelle/Zenpokoenfun|qq=}} built on a hill to the east of the Yonekura Mountains in central Yamanashi Prefecture. In addition to this kofun, other prominent kofun in the area include the {{ill|Kai Chōshizuka Kofun|ja|甲斐銚子塚古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kai Chōshizuka Kofun|qq=}}, {{ill|Ōmaruyama Kofun|ja|大丸山古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōmaruyama Kofun|qq=}}, and {{ill|Kodairazawa Kofun|ja|小平沢古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kodairazawa Kofun|qq=}}. Recent excavations have been conducted in this region. The mound is oriented north-south, with the front part facing north.{{Cite book|author=Miyazawa Kimio|year=1989|chapter=Tenjinyama Kofun|title=[[Japanese Kofun Encyclopedia]]|publisher=[[Tokyo-dō Shuppan]]|isbn=4490102607|ref={{Harvid|Tenjinyama Kofun (Kofun)|1989}}}} It measures 132 meters in length, making it the second largest kofun in Yamanashi Prefecture after the {{ill|Kai Chōshizuka Kofun|ja|甲斐銚子塚古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kai Chōshizuka Kofun|qq=}} (169 meters).{{Harvid|Tenjinyama Kofun (Kofun)|1989}} The surface of the mound shows evidence of {{ill|fukiishi|ja|葺石|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/fukiishi|qq=}}, but no {{ill|haniwa|ja|埴輪|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/haniwa|qq=}} have been found. However, Haji pottery imitating early {{ill|Sue pottery|ja|須恵器|1=Sue pottery|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sue pottery|13=User:Immanuelle/Sue pottery|qq=}} was discovered.{{Harvid|Tenjinyama Kofun (Kofun)|1989}} Surrounding the mound, a moat is believed to have existed.{{Harvid|Tenjinyama Kofun (Kofun)|1989}} The burial facility has not been identified.{{Harvid|Tenjinyama Kofun (Kofun)|1989}} The kofun is estimated to have been built in the early {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kofun period|qq=}}. The kofun site was designation1 a Kofu City Historic Site in 2009 (Heisei 21).{{Cite web|url=http://www.city.kofu.yamanashi.jp/somu-somu/shise/documents/1315_06.pdf|title=Kofu City Board of Education Notification No. 2|publisher=Kofu City Official Gazette|date=April 6, 2009}} == Excavation History == * {{ill|1951|ja|昭和26年|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1951|qq=}}-{{ill|1953|ja|昭和28th year|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1953|qq=}}: Discovery of Haji pottery during farming activities.{{Harvid|Tenjinyama Kofun (Kofun)|1989}} * {{ill|2009|ja|平成21st year|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2009|qq=}}: Designated a Kofu City Historic Site on March 25. * Excavations were conducted, with the Kofu City Board of Education publishing a report in {{ill|2015|ja|平成27th year|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2015|qq=}}. == Mound area == The area of the mound are as follows:{{Harvid|Tenjinyama Kofun (Kofun)|1989}} * Total length: 132 meters * Rear circular portion: ** Diameter: 67 meters ** Height: 12 meters * Front rectangular portion: ** Width: 29 meters ** Height: 7 meters == Historic Site == === Kofu City Designated Historic Site === * Historic Site ** **Tenjinyama Kofun** - Designated on March 25, 2009. == References == {{Reflist}} == Further Reading == {{small|(Sources used in the article)}} * {{Cite book|author=Miyazawa Kimio|year=1989|chapter=Tenjinyama Kofun|title=[[Japanese Kofun Encyclopedia]]|publisher=[[Tokyo-dō Shuppan]]|isbn=4490102607}} == Related Literature == {{small|(Literature not used in the article)}} * {{Cite book|year=2015|title=Tenjinyama Kofun: First and Second Excavation Reports (Kofu City Cultural Property Research Report No. 78)|publisher=Kofu City Board of Education}} == See Also == * {{ill|Kai Chōshizuka Kofun|ja|甲斐銚子塚古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kai Chōshizuka Kofun|qq=}} {{Kofun navbar}} {{citation needed|ja|天神山古墳|version=89534583|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Kofun template and pages that transclude it]] [[Category:Kofun template and pages that transclude it 2]] [[Category:marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:Kofun in Yamanashi Prefecture]] [[Category:History of Kofu]] [[Category:Zenpō-kōen-fun]] [[Category:Municipal Historic Sites in Yamanashi Prefecture]] [[Category:天神山古墳 (甲府市)]] [[Category:Completion tier 6]] [[Category:Tenjinyama Kofun (Kōfu)]] [[Category:Fixed Kofun templates]] [[Category:Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[sn:Tenjinyama Kofun (Kōfu)]]}} [[sn:Tenjinyama Kofun (Kōfu)]] [[ja:天神山古墳]] [[ja:%E5%A4%A9%E7%A5%9E%E5%B1%B1%E5%8F%A4%E5%A2%B3 (%E7%94%B2%E5%BA%9C%E5%B8%82)]] [[ja:&action=edit]] [[ja:天神山古墳 (甲府市)]] [[sn:enjinyama Kofun (Kōfu)]] [[Category:pages needing proper jawiki and history import]]

However, Haji pottery imitating early {{ill|Sue pottery|ja|須恵器|1=Sue pottery|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sue pottery|13=User:Immanuelle/Sue pottery|qq=}} was discovered.{{Harvid|Tenjinyama Kofun (Kofun)|1989}} Surrounding the mound, a moat is believed to have existed.{{Harvid|Tenjinyama Kofun (Kofun)|1989}} The burial facility has not been identified.{{Harvid|Tenjinyama Kofun (Kofun)|1989}} The kofun is estimated to have been built in the early {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kofun period|qq=}}. The kofun site was designation1 a Kofu City Historic Site in 2009 (Heisei 21).{{Cite web|url=http://www.city.kofu.yamanashi.jp/somu-somu/shise/documents/1315_06.pdf|title=Kofu City Board of Education Notification No. 2|publisher=Kofu City Official Gazette|date=April 6, 2009}} == Excavation History == * {{ill|1951|ja|昭和26年|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1951|qq=}}-{{ill|1953|ja|昭和28th year|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1953|qq=}}: Discovery of Haji pottery during farming activities.{{Harvid|Tenjinyama Kofun (Kofun)|1989}} * {{ill|2009|ja|平成21st year|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2009|qq=}}: Designated a Kofu City Historic Site on March 25. * Excavations were conducted, with the Kofu City Board of Education publishing a report in {{ill|2015|ja|平成27th year|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2015|qq=}}. == Mound area == The area of the mound are as follows:{{Harvid|Tenjinyama Kofun (Kofun)|1989}} * Total length: 132 meters * Rear circular portion: ** Diameter: 67 meters ** Height: 12 meters * Front rectangular portion: ** Width: 29 meters ** Height: 7 meters == Historic Site == === Kofu City Designated Historic Site === * Historic Site ** **Tenjinyama Kofun** - Designated on March 25, 2009. == References == {{Reflist}} == Further Reading == {{small|(Sources used in the article)}} * {{Cite book|author=Miyazawa Kimio|year=1989|chapter=Tenjinyama Kofun|title=[[Japanese Kofun Encyclopedia]]|publisher=[[Tokyo-dō Shuppan]]|isbn=4490102607}} == Related Literature == {{small|(Literature not used in the article)}} * {{Cite book|year=2015|title=Tenjinyama Kofun: First and Second Excavation Reports (Kofu City Cultural Property Research Report No. 78)|publisher=Kofu City Board of Education}} == See Also == * {{ill|Kai Chōshizuka Kofun|ja|甲斐銚子塚古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kai Chōshizuka Kofun|qq=}} {{Kofun navbar}} {{citation needed|ja|天神山古墳|version=89534583|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Kofun template and pages that transclude it]] [[Category:Kofun template and pages that transclude it 2]] [[Category:marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:Kofun in Yamanashi Prefecture]] [[Category:History of Kofu]] [[Category:Zenpō-kōen-fun]] [[Category:Municipal Historic Sites in Yamanashi Prefecture]] [[Category:天神山古墳 (甲府市)]] [[Category:Completion tier 6]] [[Category:Tenjinyama Kofun (Kōfu)]] [[Category:Fixed Kofun templates]] [[Category:Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[sn:Tenjinyama Kofun (Kōfu)]]}} [[sn:Tenjinyama Kofun (Kōfu)]] [[ja:天神山古墳]] [[ja:%E5%A4%A9%E7%A5%9E%E5%B1%B1%E5%8F%A4%E5%A2%B3 (%E7%94%B2%E5%BA%9C%E5%B8%82)]] [[ja:&action=edit]] [[ja:天神山古墳 (甲府市)]] [[sn:enjinyama Kofun (Kōfu)]] [[Category:pages needing proper jawiki and history import]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Tenjinyama Kofun (Kōfu)]][[Category:qq]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "Infobox Kofun in Japan" to "Infobox ancient site"
revision.text:
{{afc comment|1=trimming these off. the parameter works as "burial" so no need to use "Burial Facility"[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:35, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=added parameters Interred_individual and Mausoleum is planned to be added but I messed up in template editing[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:40, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=now we have a 'burial' and 'burial goods' parameter. So a lot of these pages might not be marked on our wiki as having unknown parameters. But specifically keeping this comment here in case of import, these parameters should be added to [[Template:infobox ancient site]] rather than deleted from this draft or article[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:02, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=I hope this is not too annoying but this article is gonna be placed under and there is a decent chance these unknown parameters are ones I want added to the main template like burial chamber structure and burial goods. Please do not use any bots that just remove the unknown parameters without looking at them. This was added through [[Special:MassEditRegex]] to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox ancient site |name = Tenjinyama Kofun |image = [[File:Tenjin-yama Kofun (Kofu), funkyu.jpg|280px]]
Mound |alternate_name = Tenjinzuka Kofun |part_of = |location = {{ill|Kofu|ja|甲府市|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kofu|qq=}}, {{ill|Yamanashi Prefecture|ja|山梨県|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamanashi Prefecture|qq=}}, Shimomukoyama Town |coordinates = 35|coordinates = 34|coordinates = 58.53 |coordinates = 138|coordinates = 34|coordinates = 48.80 |omitted = JP-19 |type = {{ill|Zenpō-kōen-fun|ja|前方後円墳|1=Zenpokoenfun|1=Zenpokoenfun|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zenpō-kōen-fun|13=User:Immanuelle/Zenpokoenfun|qq=}} |area = Mound length: 132 m
Height: 12 m (rear circular portion) |burial = Unknown |burial goods = {{ill|Haji pottery|ja|土師器|1=Haji pottery|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Haji pottery|13=User:Immanuelle/Haji pottery|qq=}} |Associated Tumuli = |built = Early {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kofun period|qq=}} |Interred_individual = |Mausoleum = |alternate_name = Kofu City Designated Historic Site: Tenjinyama Kofun |Tangible Cultural Property = |notes = Second largest kofun in Yamanashi Prefecture |map = Japan Yamanashi |type = Zenpō-kōen-fun-north |map_dot_label = Tenjinyama Kofun |map_dot_label = top }} The **Tenjinyama Kofun** (天神山古墳, also known as Tenjinzuka Kofun) is a {{ill|kofun|ja|古墳|1=Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/kofun|13=User:Immanuelle/Kofun|qq=}} located in {{ill|Kofu|ja|甲府市|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kofu|qq=}}, {{ill|Yamanashi Prefecture|ja|山梨県|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamanashi Prefecture|qq=}}, Japan. The mound is in the {{ill|Zenpō-kōen-fun|ja|前方後円墳|1=Zenpokoenfun|1=Zenpokoenfun|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zenpō-kōen-fun|13=User:Immanuelle/Zenpokoenfun|qq=}} type and has been designation1 a Kofu City Historic Site. This kofun is the second largest in Yamanashi Prefecture, following the {{ill|Kai Chōshizuka Kofun|ja|甲斐銚子塚古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kai Chōshizuka Kofun|qq=}}.Major kofun in Yamanashi Prefecture include: 1. {{ill|Kai Chōshizuka Kofun|ja|甲斐銚子塚古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kai Chōshizuka Kofun|qq=}} (Kofu City, Shimosone Town) - Mound length: 169 m. 2. **Tenjinyama Kofun** (Kofu City, Shimomukoyama Town) - Mound length: 132 m. 3. {{ill|Daimaruyama Kofun|ja|大丸山古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daimaruyama Kofun|qq=}} (Kofu City, Shimosone Town) - Mound length: approx. 120 m? It is believed to have been constructed in the early {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kofun period|qq=}}. == Overview == The Tenjinyama Kofun is a large {{ill|Zenpō-kōen-fun|ja|前方後円墳|1=Zenpokoenfun|1=Zenpokoenfun|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zenpō-kōen-fun|13=User:Immanuelle/Zenpokoenfun|qq=}} built on a hill to the east of the Yonekura Mountains in central Yamanashi Prefecture. In addition to this kofun, other prominent kofun in the area include the {{ill|Kai Chōshizuka Kofun|ja|甲斐銚子塚古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kai Chōshizuka Kofun|qq=}}, {{ill|Ōmaruyama Kofun|ja|大丸山古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōmaruyama Kofun|qq=}}, and {{ill|Kodairazawa Kofun|ja|小平沢古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kodairazawa Kofun|qq=}}. Recent excavations have been conducted in this region. The mound is oriented north-south, with the front part facing north.{{Cite book|author=Miyazawa Kimio|year=1989|chapter=Tenjinyama Kofun|title=[[Japanese Kofun Encyclopedia]]|publisher=[[Tokyo-dō Shuppan]]|isbn=4490102607|ref={{Harvid|Tenjinyama Kofun (Kofun)|1989}}}} It measures 132 meters in length, making it the second largest kofun in Yamanashi Prefecture after the {{ill|Kai Chōshizuka Kofun|ja|甲斐銚子塚古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kai Chōshizuka Kofun|qq=}} (169 meters).{{Harvid|Tenjinyama Kofun (Kofun)|1989}} The surface of the mound shows evidence of {{ill|fukiishi|ja|葺石|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/fukiishi|qq=}}, but no {{ill|haniwa|ja|埴輪|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/haniwa|qq=}} have been found. However, Haji pottery imitating early {{ill|Sue pottery|ja|須恵器|1=Sue pottery|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sue pottery|13=User:Immanuelle/Sue pottery|qq=}} was discovered.{{Harvid|Tenjinyama Kofun (Kofun)|1989}} Surrounding the mound, a moat is believed to have existed.{{Harvid|Tenjinyama Kofun (Kofun)|1989}} The burial facility has not been identified.{{Harvid|Tenjinyama Kofun (Kofun)|1989}} The kofun is estimated to have been built in the early {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kofun period|qq=}}. The kofun site was designation1 a Kofu City Historic Site in 2009 (Heisei 21).{{Cite web|url=http://www.city.kofu.yamanashi.jp/somu-somu/shise/documents/1315_06.pdf|title=Kofu City Board of Education Notification No. 2|publisher=Kofu City Official Gazette|date=April 6, 2009}} == Excavation History == * {{ill|1951|ja|昭和26年|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1951|qq=}}-{{ill|1953|ja|昭和28th year|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1953|qq=}}: Discovery of Haji pottery during farming activities.{{Harvid|Tenjinyama Kofun (Kofun)|1989}} * {{ill|2009|ja|平成21st year|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2009|qq=}}: Designated a Kofu City Historic Site on March 25. * Excavations were conducted, with the Kofu City Board of Education publishing a report in {{ill|2015|ja|平成27th year|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2015|qq=}}. == Mound area == The area of the mound are as follows:{{Harvid|Tenjinyama Kofun (Kofun)|1989}} * Total length: 132 meters * Rear circular portion: ** Diameter: 67 meters ** Height: 12 meters * Front rectangular portion: ** Width: 29 meters ** Height: 7 meters == Historic Site == === Kofu City Designated Historic Site === * Historic Site ** **Tenjinyama Kofun** - Designated on March 25, 2009. == References == {{Reflist}} == Further Reading == {{small|(Sources used in the article)}} * {{Cite book|author=Miyazawa Kimio|year=1989|chapter=Tenjinyama Kofun|title=[[Japanese Kofun Encyclopedia]]|publisher=[[Tokyo-dō Shuppan]]|isbn=4490102607}} == Related Literature == {{small|(Literature not used in the article)}} * {{Cite book|year=2015|title=Tenjinyama Kofun: First and Second Excavation Reports (Kofu City Cultural Property Research Report No. 78)|publisher=Kofu City Board of Education}} == See Also == * {{ill|Kai Chōshizuka Kofun|ja|甲斐銚子塚古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kai Chōshizuka Kofun|qq=}} {{Kofun navbar}} {{citation needed|ja|天神山古墳|version=89534583|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Kofun template and pages that transclude it]] [[Category:Kofun template and pages that transclude it 2]] [[Category:marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:Kofun in Yamanashi Prefecture]] [[Category:History of Kofu]] [[Category:Zenpō-kōen-fun]] [[Category:Municipal Historic Sites in Yamanashi Prefecture]] [[Category:天神山古墳 (甲府市)]] [[Category:Completion tier 6]] [[Category:Tenjinyama Kofun (Kōfu)]] [[Category:Fixed Kofun templates]] [[Category:Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[sn:Tenjinyama Kofun (Kōfu)]]}} [[sn:Tenjinyama Kofun (Kōfu)]] [[ja:天神山古墳]] [[ja:%E5%A4%A9%E7%A5%9E%E5%B1%B1%E5%8F%A4%E5%A2%B3 (%E7%94%B2%E5%BA%9C%E5%B8%82)]] [[ja:&action=edit]] [[ja:天神山古墳 (甲府市)]] [[sn:enjinyama Kofun (Kōfu)]] [[Category:pages needing proper jawiki and history import]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Tenjinyama Kofun (Kōfu)]][[Category:qq]]

However, Haji pottery imitating early {{ill|Sue pottery|ja|須恵器|1=Sue pottery|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sue pottery|13=User:Immanuelle/Sue pottery|qq=}} was discovered.{{Harvid|Tenjinyama Kofun (Kofun)|1989}} Surrounding the mound, a moat is believed to have existed.{{Harvid|Tenjinyama Kofun (Kofun)|1989}} The burial facility has not been identified.{{Harvid|Tenjinyama Kofun (Kofun)|1989}} The kofun is estimated to have been built in the early {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kofun period|qq=}}. The kofun site was designation1 a Kofu City Historic Site in 2009 (Heisei 21).{{Cite web|url=http://www.city.kofu.yamanashi.jp/somu-somu/shise/documents/1315_06.pdf|title=Kofu City Board of Education Notification No. 2|publisher=Kofu City Official Gazette|date=April 6, 2009}} [[ja:天神山古墳 (甲府市)]] == Excavation History == * {{ill|1951|ja|昭和26年|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1951|qq=}}-{{ill|1953|ja|昭和28th year|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1953|qq=}}: Discovery of Haji pottery during farming activities.{{Harvid|Tenjinyama Kofun (Kofun)|1989}} * {{ill|2009|ja|平成21st year|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2009|qq=}}: Designated a Kofu City Historic Site on March 25. * Excavations were conducted, with the Kofu City Board of Education publishing a report in {{ill|2015|ja|平成27th year|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2015|qq=}}. == Mound area == The area of the mound are as follows:{{Harvid|Tenjinyama Kofun (Kofun)|1989}} * Total length: 132 meters * Rear circular portion: ** Diameter: 67 meters ** Height: 12 meters * Front rectangular portion: ** Width: 29 meters ** Height: 7 meters == Historic Site == === Kofu City Designated Historic Site === * Historic Site ** **Tenjinyama Kofun** - Designated on March 25, 2009. == References == {{Reflist}} == Further Reading == {{small|(Sources used in the article)}} * {{Cite book|author=Miyazawa Kimio|year=1989|chapter=Tenjinyama Kofun|title=[[Japanese Kofun Encyclopedia]]|publisher=[[Tokyo-dō Shuppan]]|isbn=4490102607}} == Related Literature == {{small|(Literature not used in the article)}} * {{Cite book|year=2015|title=Tenjinyama Kofun: First and Second Excavation Reports (Kofu City Cultural Property Research Report No. 78)|publisher=Kofu City Board of Education}} == See Also == * {{ill|Kai Chōshizuka Kofun|ja|甲斐銚子塚古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kai Chōshizuka Kofun|qq=}} {{Kofun navbar}} {{citation needed|ja|天神山古墳|version=89534583|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Kofun template and pages that transclude it]] [[Category:Kofun template and pages that transclude it 2]] [[Category:marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:Kofun in Yamanashi Prefecture]] [[Category:History of Kofu]] [[Category:Zenpō-kōen-fun]] [[Category:Municipal Historic Sites in Yamanashi Prefecture]] [[Category:天神山古墳 (甲府市)]] [[Category:Completion tier 6]] [[Category:Tenjinyama Kofun (Kōfu)]] [[Category:Fixed Kofun templates]] [[Category:Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[sn:Tenjinyama Kofun (Kōfu)]]}} [[sn:Tenjinyama Kofun (Kōfu)]] [[ja:天神山古墳]] [[ja:%E5%A4%A9%E7%A5%9E%E5%B1%B1%E5%8F%A4%E5%A2%B3 (%E7%94%B2%E5%BA%9C%E5%B8%82)]] [[ja:&action=edit]] [[ja:天神山古墳 (甲府市)]] [[sn:enjinyama Kofun (Kōfu)]] [[Category:pages needing proper jawiki and history import]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Tenjinyama Kofun (Kōfu)]][[Category:qq]]

{{afc comment|1=trimming these off. the parameter works as "burial" so no need to use "Burial Facility"[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:35, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=added parameters Interred_individual and Mausoleum is planned to be added but I messed up in template editing[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:40, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=now we have a 'burial' and 'burial goods' parameter. So a lot of these pages might not be marked on our wiki as having unknown parameters. But specifically keeping this comment here in case of import, these parameters should be added to [[Template:infobox ancient site]] rather than deleted from this draft or article[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:02, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=I hope this is not too annoying but this article is gonna be placed under and there is a decent chance these unknown parameters are ones I want added to the main template like burial chamber structure and burial goods. Please do not use any bots that just remove the unknown parameters without looking at them. This was added through [[Special:MassEditRegex]] to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox ancient site |name = Tenjinyama Kofun |image = [[File:Tenjin-yama Kofun (Kofu), funkyu.jpg|280px]]
Mound |alternate_name = Tenjinzuka Kofun |part_of = |location = {{ill|Kofu|ja|甲府市|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kofu|qq=}}, {{ill|Yamanashi Prefecture|ja|山梨県|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamanashi Prefecture|qq=}}, Shimomukoyama Town |coordinates = 35|coordinates = 34|coordinates = 58.53 |coordinates = 138|coordinates = 34|coordinates = 48.80 |omitted = JP-19 |type = {{ill|Zenpō-kōen-fun|ja|前方後円墳|1=Zenpokoenfun|1=Zenpokoenfun|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zenpō-kōen-fun|13=User:Immanuelle/Zenpokoenfun|qq=}} |area = Mound length: 132 m
Height: 12 m (rear circular portion) |burial = Unknown |burial goods = {{ill|Haji pottery|ja|土師器|1=Haji pottery|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Haji pottery|13=User:Immanuelle/Haji pottery|qq=}} |Associated Tumuli = |built = Early {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kofun period|qq=}} |Interred_individual = |Mausoleum = |alternate_name = Kofu City Designated Historic Site: Tenjinyama Kofun |Tangible Cultural Property = |notes = Second largest kofun in Yamanashi Prefecture |map = Japan Yamanashi |type = Zenpō-kōen-fun-north |map_dot_label = Tenjinyama Kofun |map_dot_label = top }} The '''Tenjinyama Kofun''' (天神山古墳, also known as Tenjinzuka Kofun) is a {{ill|kofun|ja|古墳|1=Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/kofun|13=User:Immanuelle/Kofun|qq=}} located in {{ill|Kofu|ja|甲府市|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kofu|qq=}}, {{ill|Yamanashi Prefecture|ja|山梨県|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamanashi Prefecture|qq=}}, Japan. The mound is in the {{ill|Zenpō-kōen-fun|ja|前方後円墳|1=Zenpokoenfun|1=Zenpokoenfun|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zenpō-kōen-fun|13=User:Immanuelle/Zenpokoenfun|qq=}} type and has been designation1 a Kofu City Historic Site. This kofun is the second largest in Yamanashi Prefecture, following the {{ill|Kai Chōshizuka Kofun|ja|甲斐銚子塚古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kai Chōshizuka Kofun|qq=}}.Major kofun in Yamanashi Prefecture include: 1. {{ill|Kai Chōshizuka Kofun|ja|甲斐銚子塚古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kai Chōshizuka Kofun|qq=}} (Kofu City, Shimosone Town) - Mound length: 169 m. 2. '''Tenjinyama Kofun''' (Kofu City, Shimomukoyama Town) - Mound length: 132 m. 3. {{ill|Daimaruyama Kofun|ja|大丸山古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daimaruyama Kofun|qq=}} (Kofu City, Shimosone Town) - Mound length: approx. 120 m? It is believed to have been constructed in the early {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kofun period|qq=}}. == Overview == The Tenjinyama Kofun is a large {{ill|Zenpō-kōen-fun|ja|前方後円墳|1=Zenpokoenfun|1=Zenpokoenfun|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zenpō-kōen-fun|13=User:Immanuelle/Zenpokoenfun|qq=}} built on a hill to the east of the Yonekura Mountains in central Yamanashi Prefecture. In addition to this kofun, other prominent kofun in the area include the {{ill|Kai Chōshizuka Kofun|ja|甲斐銚子塚古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kai Chōshizuka Kofun|qq=}}, {{ill|Ōmaruyama Kofun|ja|大丸山古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōmaruyama Kofun|qq=}}, and {{ill|Kodairazawa Kofun|ja|小平沢古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kodairazawa Kofun|qq=}}. Recent excavations have been conducted in this region. The mound is oriented north-south, with the front part facing north.{{Cite book|author=Miyazawa Kimio|year=1989|chapter=Tenjinyama Kofun|title=[[Japanese Kofun Encyclopedia]]|publisher=[[Tokyo-dō Shuppan]]|isbn=4490102607|ref={{Harvid|Tenjinyama Kofun (Kofun)|1989}}}} It measures 132 meters in length, making it the second largest kofun in Yamanashi Prefecture after the {{ill|Kai Chōshizuka Kofun|ja|甲斐銚子塚古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kai Chōshizuka Kofun|qq=}} (169 meters).{{Harvid|Tenjinyama Kofun (Kofun)|1989}} The surface of the mound shows evidence of {{ill|fukiishi|ja|葺石|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/fukiishi|qq=}}, but no {{ill|haniwa|ja|埴輪|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/haniwa|qq=}} have been found. However, Haji pottery imitating early {{ill|Sue pottery|ja|須恵器|1=Sue pottery|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sue pottery|13=User:Immanuelle/Sue pottery|qq=}} was discovered.{{Harvid|Tenjinyama Kofun (Kofun)|1989}} Surrounding the mound, a moat is believed to have existed.{{Harvid|Tenjinyama Kofun (Kofun)|1989}} The burial facility has not been identified.{{Harvid|Tenjinyama Kofun (Kofun)|1989}} The kofun is estimated to have been built in the early {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kofun period|qq=}}. The kofun site was designation1 a Kofu City Historic Site in 2009 (Heisei 21).{{Cite web|url=http://www.city.kofu.yamanashi.jp/somu-somu/shise/documents/1315_06.pdf|title=Kofu City Board of Education Notification No. 2|publisher=Kofu City Official Gazette|date=April 6, 2009}} [[ja:天神山古墳 (甲府市)]] == Excavation History == * {{ill|1951|ja|昭和26年|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1951|qq=}}-{{ill|1953|ja|昭和28th year|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1953|qq=}}: Discovery of Haji pottery during farming activities.{{Harvid|Tenjinyama Kofun (Kofun)|1989}} * {{ill|2009|ja|平成21st year|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2009|qq=}}: Designated a Kofu City Historic Site on March 25. * Excavations were conducted, with the Kofu City Board of Education publishing a report in {{ill|2015|ja|平成27th year|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2015|qq=}}. == Mound area == The area of the mound are as follows:{{Harvid|Tenjinyama Kofun (Kofun)|1989}} * Total length: 132 meters * Rear circular portion: ''' Diameter: 67 meters ''' Height: 12 meters * Front rectangular portion: ''' Width: 29 meters ''' Height: 7 meters == Historic Site == === Kofu City Designated Historic Site === * Historic Site ''' '''Tenjinyama Kofun''' - Designated on March 25, 2009. == References == {{Reflist}} == Further Reading == {{small|(Sources used in the article)}} * {{Cite book|author=Miyazawa Kimio|year=1989|chapter=Tenjinyama Kofun|title=[[Japanese Kofun Encyclopedia]]|publisher=[[Tokyo-dō Shuppan]]|isbn=4490102607}} == Related Literature == {{small|(Literature not used in the article)}} * {{Cite book|year=2015|title=Tenjinyama Kofun: First and Second Excavation Reports (Kofu City Cultural Property Research Report No. 78)|publisher=Kofu City Board of Education}} == See Also == * {{ill|Kai Chōshizuka Kofun|ja|甲斐銚子塚古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kai Chōshizuka Kofun|qq=}} {{Kofun navbar}} {{citation needed|ja|天神山古墳|version=89534583|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Kofun template and pages that transclude it]] [[Category:Kofun template and pages that transclude it 2]] [[Category:marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:Kofun in Yamanashi Prefecture]] [[Category:History of Kofu]] [[Category:Zenpō-kōen-fun]] [[Category:Municipal Historic Sites in Yamanashi Prefecture]] [[Category:天神山古墳 (甲府市)]] [[Category:Completion tier 6]] [[Category:Tenjinyama Kofun (Kōfu)]] [[Category:Fixed Kofun templates]] [[Category:Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[sn:Tenjinyama Kofun (Kōfu)]]}} [[sn:Tenjinyama Kofun (Kōfu)]] [[ja:天神山古墳]] [[ja:%E5%A4%A9%E7%A5%9E%E5%B1%B1%E5%8F%A4%E5%A2%B3 (%E7%94%B2%E5%BA%9C%E5%B8%82)]] [[ja:&action=edit]] [[ja:天神山古墳 (甲府市)]] [[sn:enjinyama Kofun (Kōfu)]] [[Category:pages needing proper jawiki and history import]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Tenjinyama Kofun (Kōfu)]][[Category:qq]]

However, Haji pottery imitating early {{ill|Sue pottery|ja|須恵器|1=Sue pottery|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sue pottery|13=User:Immanuelle/Sue pottery|qq=}} was discovered.{{Harvid|Tenjinyama Kofun (Kofun)|1989}} Surrounding the mound, a moat is believed to have existed.{{Harvid|Tenjinyama Kofun (Kofun)|1989}} The burial facility has not been identified.{{Harvid|Tenjinyama Kofun (Kofun)|1989}} The kofun is estimated to have been built in the early {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kofun period|qq=}}. The kofun site was designation1 a Kofu City Historic Site in 2009 (Heisei 21).{{Cite web|url=http://www.city.kofu.yamanashi.jp/somu-somu/shise/documents/1315_06.pdf|title=Kofu City Board of Education Notification No. 2|publisher=Kofu City Official Gazette|date=April 6, 2009}} [[ja:天神山古墳 (甲府市)]] == Excavation History == * {{ill|1951|ja|昭和26年|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1951|qq=}}-{{ill|1953|ja|昭和28th year|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1953|qq=}}: Discovery of Haji pottery during farming activities.{{Harvid|Tenjinyama Kofun (Kofun)|1989}} * {{ill|2009|ja|平成21st year|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2009|qq=}}: Designated a Kofu City Historic Site on March 25. * Excavations were conducted, with the Kofu City Board of Education publishing a report in {{ill|2015|ja|平成27th year|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2015|qq=}}. == Mound area == The area of the mound are as follows:{{Harvid|Tenjinyama Kofun (Kofun)|1989}} * Total length: 132 meters * Rear circular portion: ''' Diameter: 67 meters ''' Height: 12 meters * Front rectangular portion: ''' Width: 29 meters ''' Height: 7 meters == Historic Site == === Kofu City Designated Historic Site === * Historic Site ''' '''Tenjinyama Kofun''' - Designated on March 25, 2009. == References == {{Reflist}} == Further Reading == {{small|(Sources used in the article)}} * {{Cite book|author=Miyazawa Kimio|year=1989|chapter=Tenjinyama Kofun|title=[[Japanese Kofun Encyclopedia]]|publisher=[[Tokyo-dō Shuppan]]|isbn=4490102607}} == Related Literature == {{small|(Literature not used in the article)}} * {{Cite book|year=2015|title=Tenjinyama Kofun: First and Second Excavation Reports (Kofu City Cultural Property Research Report No. 78)|publisher=Kofu City Board of Education}} == See Also == * {{ill|Kai Chōshizuka Kofun|ja|甲斐銚子塚古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kai Chōshizuka Kofun|qq=}} {{Kofun navbar}} {{citation needed|ja|天神山古墳|version=89534583|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Kofun template and pages that transclude it]] [[Category:Kofun template and pages that transclude it 2]] [[Category:marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:Kofun in Yamanashi Prefecture]] [[Category:History of Kofu]] [[Category:Zenpō-kōen-fun]] [[Category:Municipal Historic Sites in Yamanashi Prefecture]] [[Category:天神山古墳 (甲府市)]] [[Category:Completion tier 6]] [[Category:Tenjinyama Kofun (Kōfu)]] [[ja:天神山古墳 (甲府市)]] [[Category:Fixed Kofun templates]] [[Category:Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[sn:Tenjinyama Kofun (Kōfu)]]}} [[sn:Tenjinyama Kofun (Kōfu)]] [[ja:天神山古墳]] [[ja:%E5%A4%A9%E7%A5%9E%E5%B1%B1%E5%8F%A4%E5%A2%B3 (%E7%94%B2%E5%BA%9C%E5%B8%82)]] [[ja:&action=edit]] [[ja:天神山古墳 (甲府市)]] [[sn:enjinyama Kofun (Kōfu)]] [[Category:pages needing proper jawiki and history import]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Tenjinyama Kofun (Kōfu)]][[Category:qq]]

revision.comment: removed [[Category:Pages needing proper jawiki and history import]]; added [[Category:Pages needing history import]] using [[Help:Gadget-HotCat|HotCat]]
revision.text:
{{afc comment|1=trimming these off. the parameter works as "burial" so no need to use "Burial Facility"[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:35, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=added parameters Interred_individual and Mausoleum is planned to be added but I messed up in template editing[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:40, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=now we have a 'burial' and 'burial goods' parameter. So a lot of these pages might not be marked on our wiki as having unknown parameters. But specifically keeping this comment here in case of import, these parameters should be added to [[Template:infobox ancient site]] rather than deleted from this draft or article[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:02, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=I hope this is not too annoying but this article is gonna be placed under and there is a decent chance these unknown parameters are ones I want added to the main template like burial chamber structure and burial goods. Please do not use any bots that just remove the unknown parameters without looking at them. This was added through [[Special:MassEditRegex]] to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox ancient site |name = Tenjinyama Kofun |image = [[File:Tenjin-yama Kofun (Kofu), funkyu.jpg|280px]]
Mound |alternate_name = Tenjinzuka Kofun |part_of = |location = {{ill|Kofu|ja|甲府市|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kofu|qq=}}, {{ill|Yamanashi Prefecture|ja|山梨県|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamanashi Prefecture|qq=}}, Shimomukoyama Town |coordinates = 35|coordinates = 34|coordinates = 58.53 |coordinates = 138|coordinates = 34|coordinates = 48.80 |omitted = JP-19 |type = {{ill|Zenpō-kōen-fun|ja|前方後円墳|1=Zenpokoenfun|1=Zenpokoenfun|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zenpō-kōen-fun|13=User:Immanuelle/Zenpokoenfun|qq=}} |area = Mound length: 132 m
Height: 12 m (rear circular portion) |burial = Unknown |burial goods = {{ill|Haji pottery|ja|土師器|1=Haji pottery|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Haji pottery|13=User:Immanuelle/Haji pottery|qq=}} |Associated Tumuli = |built = Early {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kofun period|qq=}} |Interred_individual = |Mausoleum = |alternate_name = Kofu City Designated Historic Site: Tenjinyama Kofun |Tangible Cultural Property = |notes = Second largest kofun in Yamanashi Prefecture |map = Japan Yamanashi |type = Zenpō-kōen-fun-north |map_dot_label = Tenjinyama Kofun |map_dot_label = top }} The '''Tenjinyama Kofun''' (天神山古墳, also known as Tenjinzuka Kofun) is a {{ill|kofun|ja|古墳|1=Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/kofun|13=User:Immanuelle/Kofun|qq=}} located in {{ill|Kofu|ja|甲府市|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kofu|qq=}}, {{ill|Yamanashi Prefecture|ja|山梨県|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamanashi Prefecture|qq=}}, Japan. The mound is in the {{ill|Zenpō-kōen-fun|ja|前方後円墳|1=Zenpokoenfun|1=Zenpokoenfun|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zenpō-kōen-fun|13=User:Immanuelle/Zenpokoenfun|qq=}} type and has been designation1 a Kofu City Historic Site. This kofun is the second largest in Yamanashi Prefecture, following the {{ill|Kai Chōshizuka Kofun|ja|甲斐銚子塚古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kai Chōshizuka Kofun|qq=}}.Major kofun in Yamanashi Prefecture include: 1. {{ill|Kai Chōshizuka Kofun|ja|甲斐銚子塚古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kai Chōshizuka Kofun|qq=}} (Kofu City, Shimosone Town) - Mound length: 169 m. 2. '''Tenjinyama Kofun''' (Kofu City, Shimomukoyama Town) - Mound length: 132 m. 3. {{ill|Daimaruyama Kofun|ja|大丸山古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daimaruyama Kofun|qq=}} (Kofu City, Shimosone Town) - Mound length: approx. 120 m? It is believed to have been constructed in the early {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kofun period|qq=}}. == Overview == The Tenjinyama Kofun is a large {{ill|Zenpō-kōen-fun|ja|前方後円墳|1=Zenpokoenfun|1=Zenpokoenfun|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zenpō-kōen-fun|13=User:Immanuelle/Zenpokoenfun|qq=}} built on a hill to the east of the Yonekura Mountains in central Yamanashi Prefecture. In addition to this kofun, other prominent kofun in the area include the {{ill|Kai Chōshizuka Kofun|ja|甲斐銚子塚古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kai Chōshizuka Kofun|qq=}}, {{ill|Ōmaruyama Kofun|ja|大丸山古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōmaruyama Kofun|qq=}}, and {{ill|Kodairazawa Kofun|ja|小平沢古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kodairazawa Kofun|qq=}}. Recent excavations have been conducted in this region. The mound is oriented north-south, with the front part facing north.{{Cite book|author=Miyazawa Kimio|year=1989|chapter=Tenjinyama Kofun|title=[[Japanese Kofun Encyclopedia]]|publisher=[[Tokyo-dō Shuppan]]|isbn=4490102607|ref={{Harvid|Tenjinyama Kofun (Kofun)|1989}}}} It measures 132 meters in length, making it the second largest kofun in Yamanashi Prefecture after the {{ill|Kai Chōshizuka Kofun|ja|甲斐銚子塚古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kai Chōshizuka Kofun|qq=}} (169 meters).{{Harvid|Tenjinyama Kofun (Kofun)|1989}} The surface of the mound shows evidence of {{ill|fukiishi|ja|葺石|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/fukiishi|qq=}}, but no {{ill|haniwa|ja|埴輪|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/haniwa|qq=}} have been found. However, Haji pottery imitating early {{ill|Sue pottery|ja|須恵器|1=Sue pottery|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sue pottery|13=User:Immanuelle/Sue pottery|qq=}} was discovered.{{Harvid|Tenjinyama Kofun (Kofun)|1989}} Surrounding the mound, a moat is believed to have existed.{{Harvid|Tenjinyama Kofun (Kofun)|1989}} The burial facility has not been identified.{{Harvid|Tenjinyama Kofun (Kofun)|1989}} The kofun is estimated to have been built in the early {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kofun period|qq=}}. The kofun site was designation1 a Kofu City Historic Site in 2009 (Heisei 21).{{Cite web|url=http://www.city.kofu.yamanashi.jp/somu-somu/shise/documents/1315_06.pdf|title=Kofu City Board of Education Notification No. 2|publisher=Kofu City Official Gazette|date=April 6, 2009}} [[ja:天神山古墳 (甲府市)]] == Excavation History == * {{ill|1951|ja|昭和26年|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1951|qq=}}-{{ill|1953|ja|昭和28th year|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1953|qq=}}: Discovery of Haji pottery during farming activities.{{Harvid|Tenjinyama Kofun (Kofun)|1989}} * {{ill|2009|ja|平成21st year|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2009|qq=}}: Designated a Kofu City Historic Site on March 25. * Excavations were conducted, with the Kofu City Board of Education publishing a report in {{ill|2015|ja|平成27th year|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2015|qq=}}. == Mound area == The area of the mound are as follows:{{Harvid|Tenjinyama Kofun (Kofun)|1989}} * Total length: 132 meters * Rear circular portion: ''' Diameter: 67 meters ''' Height: 12 meters * Front rectangular portion: ''' Width: 29 meters ''' Height: 7 meters == Historic Site == === Kofu City Designated Historic Site === * Historic Site ''' '''Tenjinyama Kofun''' - Designated on March 25, 2009. == References == {{Reflist}} == Further Reading == {{small|(Sources used in the article)}} * {{Cite book|author=Miyazawa Kimio|year=1989|chapter=Tenjinyama Kofun|title=[[Japanese Kofun Encyclopedia]]|publisher=[[Tokyo-dō Shuppan]]|isbn=4490102607}} == Related Literature == {{small|(Literature not used in the article)}} * {{Cite book|year=2015|title=Tenjinyama Kofun: First and Second Excavation Reports (Kofu City Cultural Property Research Report No. 78)|publisher=Kofu City Board of Education}} == See Also == * {{ill|Kai Chōshizuka Kofun|ja|甲斐銚子塚古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kai Chōshizuka Kofun|qq=}} {{Kofun navbar}} {{citation needed|ja|天神山古墳|version=89534583|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Kofun template and pages that transclude it]] [[Category:Kofun template and pages that transclude it 2]] [[Category:marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:Kofun in Yamanashi Prefecture]] [[Category:History of Kofu]] [[Category:Zenpō-kōen-fun]] [[Category:Municipal Historic Sites in Yamanashi Prefecture]] [[Category:天神山古墳 (甲府市)]] [[Category:Completion tier 6]] [[Category:Tenjinyama Kofun (Kōfu)]] [[ja:天神山古墳 (甲府市)]] [[Category:Fixed Kofun templates]] [[Category:Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[sn:Tenjinyama Kofun (Kōfu)]]}} [[sn:Tenjinyama Kofun (Kōfu)]] [[ja:天神山古墳]] [[ja:%E5%A4%A9%E7%A5%9E%E5%B1%B1%E5%8F%A4%E5%A2%B3 (%E7%94%B2%E5%BA%9C%E5%B8%82)]] [[ja:&action=edit]] [[ja:天神山古墳 (甲府市)]] [[sn:enjinyama Kofun (Kōfu)]] [[Category:Pages needing history import]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Tenjinyama Kofun (Kōfu)]][[Category:qq]]

revision.comment: 7 revisions imported: Bot: import full history from ja:天神山古墳 (甲府市) up to rev 99995729
revision.text:
{{日本の古墳 |名称 = 天神山古墳 |画像 = [[File:Tenjin-yama Kofun (Kofu), funkyu.jpg|280px]]
墳丘 |別名 = 天神塚古墳 |所属 = |所在地 = [[山梨県]][[甲府市]]下向山町 |緯度度 = 35|緯度分 = 34|緯度秒 = 58.53 |経度度 =138|経度分 = 34|経度秒 = 48.80 |ISO = JP-19 |形状 = [[前方後円墳]] |規模 = 墳丘長132m
高さ12m（後円部） |埋葬施設 = 不明 |出土品 = [[土師器]] |陪塚 = |築造時期 = [[古墳時代]]前期 |被葬者 = |陵墓 = |史跡 = 甲府市指定史跡「天神山古墳」 |有形文化財 = |特記事項 = 山梨県第2位の規模 |地図 = Japan Yamanashi |アイコン = 前方後円墳-北 |ラベル = 天神山古墳 |ラベル位置 = top }} '''天神山古墳'''（てんじんやまこふん、天神塚古墳）は、[[山梨県]][[甲府市]]下向山町にある[[古墳]]。形状は[[前方後円墳]]。甲府市指定史跡に指定されている。 山梨県では第2位の規模の古墳で山梨県における主な古墳は次の通り。 # [[甲斐銚子塚古墳]]（甲府市下曽根町） - 墳丘長169メートル。 # '''天神山古墳'''（甲府市下向山町） - 墳丘長132メートル。 # [[大丸山古墳]]（甲府市下曽根町） - 墳丘長120メートルか。、[[古墳時代]]前期頃の築造と推定される。 == 概要 == 山梨県中部、米倉山東方の丘陵上に築造された大型前方後円墳である。一帯では本古墳のほか[[甲斐銚子塚古墳]]・[[大丸山古墳]]・[[小平沢古墳]]といった有力古墳の築造が知られる。近年に発掘調査が実施されている。 墳形は前方後円形で、墳丘主軸を南北方向として前方部を北方向に向ける{{Sfn|天神山古墳（古墳）|1989}}。墳丘長は132メートルを測り、山梨県では[[甲斐銚子塚古墳]]（甲府市下曽根町、169メートル）に次ぐ第2位の規模になる{{Sfn|天神山古墳（古墳）|1989}}。墳丘外表では[[葺石]]が認められるが、[[埴輪]]は認められておらず、初期[[須恵器]]を模倣した[[土師器]]𤭯が出土されている{{Sfn|天神山古墳（古墳）|1989}}。墳丘周囲には周溝の存在が推定される{{Sfn|天神山古墳（古墳）|1989}}。埋葬施設は明らかでない{{Sfn|天神山古墳（古墳）|1989}}。築造時期は[[古墳時代]]前期頃と推定される。 古墳域は[[2009年]]（[[平成]]21年）に甲府市指定史跡に指定されている。 == 遺跡歴 == * [[1951年|1951]]-[[1953年]]（[[昭和]]26-28年）頃、耕作中に土師器𤭯の出土{{Sfn|天神山古墳（古墳）|1989}}。 * [[2009年]]（[[平成]]21年）3月25日、甲府市指定史跡に指定。 * 発掘調査（甲府市教育委員会、[[2015年]]に報告書刊行）。 == 墳丘 == 墳丘の規模は次の通り{{Sfn|天神山古墳（古墳）|1989}}。 * 墳丘長：132メートル * 後円部 ** 直径：67メートル ** 高さ：12メートル * 前方部 ** 幅：29メートル ** 高さ：7メートル == 文化財 == === 甲府市指定文化財 === * 史跡 ** 天神山古墳 - 2009年（平成21年）3月25日指定平成21年4月6日甲府市公報より{{PDFlink|[http://www.city.kofu.yamanashi.jp/somu-somu/shise/documents/1315_06.pdf 甲府市教育委員会告示第2号]}}（リンクは甲府市ホームページ）。。 == 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} '''注釈''' {{reflist|group="注"}} '''出典''' {{reflist}} == 参考文献 == {{small|（記事執筆に使用した文献）}} * {{Cite book|和書|editor=|author=宮沢公雄|year=1989|chapter=天神山古墳|title=[[日本古墳大辞典]]|publisher=[[東京堂出版]]|isbn=4490102607|ref={{Harvid|天神山古墳（古墳）|1989}}}} == 関連文献 == {{small|（記事執筆に使用していない関連文献）}} * {{Cite book|和書|editor=|author=|year=2015|chapter=|title=天神山古墳 -第一次・第二次発掘調査報告書-（甲府市文化財調査報告 78）|publisher=甲府市教育委員会|isbn=|ref=}} == 関連項目 == * [[甲斐銚子塚古墳]] {{デフォルトソート:てんしんやまこふん こうふし}} [[Category:山梨県の古墳]] [[Category:甲府市の歴史]] [[Category:前方後円墳]] [[Category:山梨県内の市町村指定史跡]]
